title: Development Cards
vpHint: Counts toward your {{target}} VP — never played (R9.8).

desc.knight: Move the robber and steal 1 resource from an adjacent player. 3 played knights earn you the Largest Army.
desc.roadBuilding_one: Build {{count}} road for free, right now.
desc.roadBuilding_other: Build {{count}} roads for free, right now.
desc.yearOfPlenty_one: Take any {{count}} resource of your choice from the bank.
desc.yearOfPlenty_other: Take any {{count}} resources of your choice from the bank.
desc.monopoly: Name a resource — every other player must hand over all of theirs.
desc.victoryPoint: Worth 1 victory point. Kept hidden — this card is never played.
desc.bumperCrop: Gain 1 of every resource type the bank can still supply (cardMods).
desc.merchantsBoon: A one-shot 2:1 trade with the bank (cardMods).
desc.roadToll: Every other player holding the named resource gives you 1 of it (cardMods).
desc.trailblazer: Build 1 free road with no connectivity requirement (cardMods).
desc.windfall: Draw the top 2 development cards into your hand for free (cardMods).
desc.highwayman: Relocate the robber with no steal at all (cardMods).

reason.alreadyPlayed: Already played a card this turn
reason.cannotPlay: No road pieces, or nowhere legal to build
reason.cantAfford: Need {{need}} of some resource (have at most {{have}}).

roadBuilding.banner_one: Road Building: place {{count}} more free road.
roadBuilding.banner_other: Road Building: place {{count}} more free roads.

yearOfPlenty.title: Year of Plenty
yearOfPlenty.instructions: Pick {{count}} resources to take from the bank — repeats are fine.

monopoly.title: Monopoly
monopoly.instructions: Pick a resource. Every other player hands over all of it.
